transforms.code:
"""
    Transform OEE percentage (0-100) to status text
    
    Status Mapping:
    0-29%: Critical
    30-49%: Needs Improvement 
    50-69%: Average
    70-84%: Good
    85-100%: Excellent
    """
    
    # Handle None or invalid values
    if value is None:
        return "No Data"
    
    # Convert value to string and strip % sign if present
    try:
        value_str = str(value).strip()
        if value_str.endswith('%'):
            value_str = value_str[:-1]  # Remove the % sign
        percentage = float(value_str)
    except (ValueError, TypeError):
        return "Invalid Data"
    
    # Ensure value is between 0 and 100
    percentage = max(0, min(100, percentage))
    
    # Define OEE status text thresholds
    if percentage >= 85:
        # Excellent: 85-100%
        return "Excellent"
    elif percentage >= 70:
        # Good: 70-84%
        return "Good"
    elif percentage >= 50:
        # Average: 50-69%
        return "Average"
    elif percentage >= 30:
        # Needs Improvement: 30-49%
        return "Needs Improvement"
    else:
        # Critical: 0-29%
        return "Critical"

"""
    Transform OEE percentage (0-100) to Tesla-style color hex codes
    
    Color Mapping:
    0-29%: Critical (Red) - #ef4444
    30-49%: Poor (Orange) - #f97316 
    50-69%: Average (Yellow) - #f59e0b
    70-84%: Good (Blue) - #3b82f6
    85-100%: Excellent (Green) - #10b981
    
    For smooth gradients, interpolates between threshold colors
    """
    
    # Handle None or invalid values
    if value is None:
        return "#6b7280"  # Gray for null values
    
    # Convert value to string and strip % sign if present
    try:
        value_str = str(value).strip()
        if value_str.endswith('%'):
            value_str = value_str[:-1]  # Remove the % sign
        percentage = float(value_str)
    except (ValueError, TypeError):
        return "#6b7280"  # Gray for invalid values
    
    # Ensure value is between 0 and 100
    percentage = max(0, min(100, percentage))
    
    # Define Tesla OEE color thresholds
    if percentage >= 85:
        # Excellent: 85-100% -> Green
        return "#10b981"
    elif percentage >= 70:
        # Good: 70-84% -> Blue 
        return "#3b82f6"
    elif percentage >= 50:
        # Average: 50-69% -> Yellow
        return "#f59e0b"
    elif percentage >= 30:
        # Poor: 30-49% -> Orange
        return "#f97316"
    else:
        # Critical: 0-29% -> Red
        return "#ef4444"
